title: Login page not loading
description: The login page displays a blank screen on Chrome browser. Tried clearing cache but issue persists.

title: Payment processing error
description: Customers are receiving timeout errors when attempting to complete checkout with credit cards.

title: Profile picture upload failing
description: Unable to upload profile pictures larger than 1MB. Getting 'file too large' error even for small images.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Order confirmation emails are not being delivered. Checked spam folder with no results.

title: Dashboard loading slowly
description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. All other pages load normally.

title: Mobile app crashing on startup
description: iOS app crashes immediately after splash screen. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.2.

title: Search function returning wrong results
description: Product search shows unrelated items. Searching for 'laptop' returns kitchen appliances.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Password reset emails contain links that show as expired immediately upon clicking.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Promo code SAVE20 is not applying the 20% discount at checkout. Code should be valid until March 2026.

title: Account locked after failed attempts
description: Account got locked after 2 failed login attempts instead of the stated 5 attempts policy.

title: Invoice PDF not generating
description: Download invoice button produces a corrupted PDF file that cannot be opened.

title: Two-factor authentication issues
description: SMS codes for 2FA are arriving 10+ minutes late, making login impossible.

title: Wishlist items disappearing
description: Items added to wishlist are gone after logging out and back in.

title: Shipping address not saving
description: New shipping addresses cannot be saved to account profile. Form clears after submission.

title: Order history showing duplicates
description: Each order appears twice in order history. Concerned about being charged multiple times.
